steps.title: Use the form contrast
steps.content: Traditional forms are recognizable even as they evolve. The blank describes forms that borrow from different genres and straddle prose and poetry, so the word should mean lacking a fixed or clear form.

steps.title: Match the blended form
steps.content: B means scattered, C means usual or conventional, and D means impartial or neither side. The needed word describes something without a definite shape, matching unconventional works that blend categories. The answer is A.
